name: Tote
description:
HERMES FOURRE-TOUT MM TOTE

This is a lovely Fourre-Tout tote bag made by Hermès. It is made in a cream and black 100% cotton and produced in France. It is in extremely nice condition. The interior is extremely clean and all of the zippers and snaps work perfectly. The exterior is in great condition. The bottom corners do show wear and very light staining. This is quite common with these bags. Otherwise, its in beautiful condition. There is a non-Hermes dust bag included for storage. Offers are encouraged. Thank you for looking.

MEASUREMENTS
4" WIDE
16.5" LONG
11" TALL
4" HANDLES
